title: DashboardConfig
description: Configuration written by dashboard-orchestrator-agent to orchestrations/dashboards/live/dashboard/config.json. The agent substitutes these values into base-dashboard.html template variables.

phases.description: Phase list derived from prd.json implementationOrder. Substituted into {{PHASES_JSON}}.

stories.description: Flat story list from prd.json. Substituted into {{STORIES_JSON}}. Agent must copy all story fields including actualCost from phase-cost.jsonl.

controlPlanePort.description: TCP port for the Express control plane sidecar. Substituted into {{CONTROL_PLANE_PORT}}.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often the dashboard polls for updates (milliseconds).

logsBasePath.description: Relative path from dashboard/index.html to the logs directory containing *.jsonl files.

chartConfig.description: Chart.js overrides substituted into {{CHART_CONFIG}}. Agent may tune type, colors, and scale options for this specific project. Must remain Chart.js v4 compatible.

options.description: Partial Chart.js options object merged with template defaults. Keep to scale/plugin overrides only.
